## [G-01] Cause of residual avoidance in GR66 KO larvae

Content: Some avoidance persists in KO larvae, requiring identification of other receptor candidates besides GR66.
Related Claim: C-04
Action: Narrow down co-expressed GR family genes from RNA-seq data and conduct RNAi screening
Status: open

## [G-02] GR66 expression and function in adults

Content: This study is limited to larvae; the role of GR66 in oviposition site selection in adults is unknown.
Related Claim: C-01
Action: Confirm expression in adult antennae and ovipositor (RT-PCR), conduct oviposition selection assay
Status: open
